narrative:
Precinct Sylvania Township B (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,207 registered voters, with 60.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.7 percentage points.
